feedback.text: I believe that the rights to privacy, opinions and to own things are in increasing danger in this modern world that we live in. I believe it is in the interests of EU citizens to have safeguards in place to prevent companies from destroying what has already been paid for. For this reason I believe that Digital Fairness Act would be a good place to have some sort of requirement for the publishers of the games to leave a product(in this case videogames) in usable state after the online support stops. Of course it is not reasonable to request that they keep the servers up forever. All we ask is that we have some way of enjoying what we paid for, be that in the form of hosting fanbase-upheld servers or otherwise being able to play them.
